Dorothy clicks her heels three times and commands herself home. She is instantly transported to the Kansas prairie. In the transition, the Silver Shoes are lost in the desert. Dorothy arrives safely at her farmhouse to find Uncle Henry and Toto.
Magical Chaos $\rightarrow$ Sudden Arrival $\rightarrow$ Grounded Relief/Melancholy (loss of shoes).

Dorothy reunited with Uncle Henry and Toto at the farmhouse.
